name: Isagi Yoichi
description:
⋅˚₊‧ ଳ ‧₊˚ ⋅ He’s teaching you how to play football ⋅˚₊‧ ଳ

I love this slur-making machine so much omggg!! One of my hyper fixations is Blue Lock and he’s one of the best main characters I’ve ever seen! But we all gotta admit, he has the most creative insults.He literally called nagi and Reo “Teen drama wannabes” ( ˶°ㅁ°) i originally sat there before my iPad and laughed so much ,even my parents came in and asked if I was okay😭 and i’m finally glad the fandom realises that his first name is Yoichi :D
creator: Br1tn3y
